seed_json.premise: In a world governed by the System — a divine framework that assigns every person a class, tracks their statistics, and rewards growth with tangible power — a young scribe's stats have been lying since she received them at fourteen. Her Strength reads 3. She has bent iron bars with her hands. The System has never corrected the discrepancy. Now a System Arbiter has arrived in her city to investigate an anomaly — her anomaly.

characters.name: Maret
characters.description: Scribe, early 20s. Has lived with false stats for eight years by hiding what she can do. Uses her official Scribe class as cover — the administrative access it grants lets her avoid most physical situations. Smart, secretive, deeply uncertain whether the System is protecting her or preparing something. Has never told anyone her real numbers.

characters.name: Journeyman Theo
characters.description: A young adventurer in Maret's city. His stats are genuinely mediocre — he knows exactly what he is and is at peace with it. Befriended Maret two years ago because she's smarter than anyone in his party. Has noticed that she avoids combat situations in ways that don't match a Scribe's normal reasons. Doesn't push. Asks good questions.

characters.name: Arbiter Cassel
characters.description: System Arbiter, mid-40s. Investigates discrepancies between System records and observed reality. Genuinely believes in the System's justice — the Framework doesn't make mistakes, so anomalies must be corrected. His case file has Maret flagged as Threat Level: Unknown. He's not wrong to be cautious. He also doesn't know the System flagged her anomaly eight years ago and chose not to correct it.

obligations.text: Maret crushes a steel inkwell with her grip and hides it in her desk drawer.
Maret's quill snaps under her grip as she tries to copy a scroll.
Theo eyes the broken quill and Maret's steady hands, deducing she is hiding physical strength.
Theo mentions an Arbiter has arrived in the city investigating an anomaly.
Maret learns from Theo that an Arbiter is investigating an anomaly, and her blood runs cold.
Maret returns to find Arbiter Cassel at her desk; he introduces himself formally.
Cassel points out that Maret's calluses and posture suggest physical training not recorded in the System.
Cassel observes Maret's calluses and posture and becomes suspicious that her records do not match her physical condition.
Cassel requests to view Maret's stats; Maret stalls by citing Guild protocol requiring a witness, and Cassel agrees to summon the Guildmaster.
While Cassel sends a message, Maret palms a sharp shard of broken quill and hides it.
The Guildmaster arrives and agrees to witness the stat viewing.
Maret whispers to Theo that if the Arbiter sees her stats, she'll be taken away; Theo promises to cause a distraction.
Maret tells Theo that if the Arbiter sees her stats, she'll be taken away; he now knows she is in serious danger.
Cassel activates the crystal and Maret's stats display: Strength 3, Dexterity 5, etc., matching her records, but Cassel frowns.
Cassel announces he will conduct a physical assessment at dawn tomorrow.
Maret learns from Cassel that he will conduct a physical assessment at dawn.
Maret feels the trap closing, but she has a plan with Theo and a hidden shard; she is terrified but determined.
Theo's hand twitches toward his dagger; he is worried and committed to protecting Maret.
